title: 4.2: Create renovate.json
3.4: Create modules/tmux.nix
3.1: Create modules/bash.nix
description:
Convert .bash_profile and .bashrc to programs.bash module.

```nix
programs.bash = {
  enable = true;
  shellAliases = { ls = "lsd"; k = "kubecolor"; };
  profileExtra = ''
    # OS detection
    [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ] && export MACOS=1 && export UNIX=1
    [ "$(uname -s)" = "Linux" ] && export LINUX=1 && export UNIX=1

    # Path functions (pathmunge, move_to_front)
    # Core paths (/usr/local/sbin, $HOME/bin)
    # Homebrew setup
    # VS Code, Krew paths
    # Bash completion
    # Tool aliases (lsd, vim/EDITOR)
    # OrbStack
    # Nix PATH priority
  '';
  initExtra = ''
    # Ghostty integration
    # History settings (checkwinsize, histappend, cmdhist, HISTSIZE, etc.)
    # Prompt (colors, flake_segment, user_segment, git_branch_segment)
    # Cargo
    # LMStudio
  '';
};
```

title: 4.1: Create GitHub Actions workflow
description:
Create .github/workflows/check.yaml for CI.

```yaml
name: Check
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
jobs:
  check:
    runs-on: macos-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@main
      - uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@main
      - name: Check flake
        run: nix flake check
      - name: Build packages
        run: nix build .#homeConfigurations.coneill.activationPackage
```

title: Phase 3: Config Modules Migration
description:
## Goals
1. Replace hand-written dotfiles with programs.* modules
2. Use home.file for static configs
3. Remove YADM dependency

## Sub-tasks
- 3.1: Create modules/bash.nix
- 3.2: Create modules/tools.nix
- 3.3: Create modules/git.nix
- 3.4: Create modules/tmux.nix
- 3.5: Create modules/vim.nix
- 3.6: Static files via home.file
- 3.7: Update home.nix imports
- 3.8: Remove old dotfiles

## Final imports structure
```nix
imports = [
  ./modules/packages.nix
  ./modules/bash.nix
  ./modules/tools.nix
  ./modules/git.nix
  ./modules/tmux.nix
  ./modules/vim.nix
];
```

| modules/vim.nix | CREATE |

| .bash_profile | DELETE |

title: 3.3: Create modules/git.nix
Phase 2: Home-Manager Integration
3.6: Static files via home.file
3.2: Create modules/tools.nix
4.3: Create pre-commit config
description:
Create .pre-commit-config.yaml for nix formatting.

```yaml
repos:
  - repo: https://github.com/nix-community/nixpkgs-fmt
    rev: v1.3.0
    hooks:
      - id: nixpkgs-fmt
  - repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks
    rev: v4.5.0
    hooks:
      - id: trailing-whitespace
      - id: end-of-file-fixer
      - id: check-yaml
      - id: check-added-large-files
  - repo: local
    hooks:
      - id: nix-flake-check
        name: nix flake check
        entry: nix flake check
        language: system
        pass_filenames: false
        files: '\.nix$|flake\.lock$'
```

Remove .github/workflows/linuxbrew-cache.yaml

This old workflow is no longer needed after migration to nix.

title: 3.8: Remove old dotfiles
description:
After migration verified, delete old hand-written dotfiles.

Files to delete:
- .bash_profile (now generated by home-manager)
- .bashrc (now generated by home-manager)
- .gitconfig##os.Darwin
- .gitconfig##os.Linux
- .gitconfig-common
- .tmux.conf
- .vimrc
- .config/yadm/ directory

This should be the LAST step after verifying everything works.

title: Dotfiles Migration to Nix-Centric Architecture
description:
Migrate from YADM + Homebrew to home-manager with declarative Nix configuration.

## Architecture Decisions
- home-manager standalone (user-level only)
- `programs.*` modules for dotfile management
- Home directory versions are canonical
- Single universal config
- Delete old files immediately (no legacy/ archive)

## Rollback Strategy
- `home-manager generations` to list previous generations
- `home-manager switch --rollback` to revert
- Git history preserves old versions
- `nix-shell -p bash` as escape hatch for broken shell

## Phases
1. Cleanup & Foundation (DONE)
2. Home-Manager Integration (DONE)
3. Config Modules Migration
4. CI, Renovate & Pre-commit Hooks

title: 3.7: Update home.nix imports
description:
Add imports for all new modules to home.nix.

```nix
imports = [
  ./modules/packages.nix
  ./modules/bash.nix
  ./modules/tools.nix
  ./modules/git.nix
  ./modules/tmux.nix
  ./modules/vim.nix
];
```

This should be done after all modules are created and tested.

title: 4.4: Add devShell to flake.nix

description:

1. Clean up cruft and reconcile drift
2. Move nix flake into dotfiles repo
3. Create repo documentation (README, CLAUDE.md)
4. Fix broken nix-search
5. Simplify shell config (remove dead code)

- Step 1.1: Delete cruft (homebrew/, script/docker-*)

- Step 1.5: Fix nix-search (update flake input)
- Step 1.6: Create README.md
- Step 1.7: Create CLAUDE.md
